title: Error when copying dynamic array into fixed-size array of same size
body:
In regressions of cases from the SystemVerilog LRM, legal case on 1800-2012 page 116-117 (or 1800-2023 page 161) errors out:

%Error: VARREF 'sv12_lrm_p0117_int_c_new.B' is not an unpacked array, but is in an unpacked array context
%Error: ARRAYSEL is not an unpacked array, but is in an unpacked array context

**Code:**
```
int A[2][100:1];
int B[] = new[100];
int D [3][][];

initial begin
    A[1] = B;
    A = D[2];
end
```

**Version:**
5.044

**Environment:**
Centos 7.9，GCC 11.5
